citySelector.label: City
citySelector.description: Sofia is live in this prototype. Next-city slots are scaffolded for future betas.

auth.title: Account and sync
auth.subtitle: Sign in with a magic link so reports and meetups can sync across devices.
auth.checkInbox: Check your inbox for the sign-in link.
auth.signedIn: Signed in. Shared sync is ready.
auth.signedOut: Signed out. Drafts still stay on this device.
auth.unavailable: Supabase auth is not configured yet. Add the public URL and anon key to enable sign-in.

home.title: Ride calmer. Explore smarter.
home.subtitle: A local-first prototype for safer routing, useful stops, themed rides and lightweight meetup coordination without turning into a noisy social app.
home.reportSubtitle: Structured reports keep the map useful, fast and easier to moderate.
home.placeSubtitle: Suggest a useful cycling spot with an exact pin so it can be reviewed for the shared map.
home.placeNamePlaceholder: Example: fountain by the park gate
home.placeNotePlaceholder: Add what riders should know about this place...
home.placeSafetyNote: Community places should be specific, useful and safe to publish after moderation.
home.notePlaceholder: Example: parked car blocks the lane, pass only on the sidewalk...
home.reportSafetyNote: Community reports can go stale. Double-check real conditions before you ride through.
home.meetupSafetyNote: Meet in public places and share personal contact details only if you want to.

meetupActions.joined: You are in for this ride.
meetupActions.shareUnavailable: Copy the page URL manually on this device.

reportLocation.precise: Report will use your current location when permission is available.
reportLocation.fallback: GPS was approximate or unavailable, so the report used the Sofia fallback pin.
reportLocation.blocked: Location permission was blocked, so the report used the Sofia fallback pin.
reportLocation.manual: Report will use the exact map pin you selected.

reportMapPick.active: Pin mode is active. Click the map for exact placement.

placeMapPick.active: Place pin mode is active. Click the map for exact placement.
placeMapPick.required: Choose an exact point on the map before submitting the place.

placeResult.submitted: Place submitted for review. It will appear after moderation.
placeResult.authRequired: Sign in before sending a community place to the shared map.
placeResult.unavailable: Place submission is unavailable right now.

reportSync.sharedSaved: Saved on device and published to the shared map.
reportSync.authRequired: Saved on device. Sign in later to publish this report to the shared map.
reportSync.unavailable: Saved on device. Shared sync is not configured or currently unavailable.

home.quickSignalsSubtitle: Recent rider reports around the current map view.

weekly.title: Weekly pulse
weekly.subtitle: A lightweight dashboard for streaks, calm kilometers and map contribution.

lastRide.title: Repeat last route
lastRide.subtitle: Jump back into the current route profile or open the routes tab for more choices.

home.dashboardActionsSubtitle: Keep the dashboard map clean, then jump into route planning or social coordination when you need it.

routePlanner.title: Routes tab
routePlanner.subtitle: Use this tab as the route desk. Later we plug real safe, balanced and fast routing in here.

socialHub.title: Social tab
socialHub.subtitle: Meetups, quick reports and bike + transit tips live here so the main dashboard stays calmer.
socialHub.placesSubtitle: Approved permanent and official places that help the city map stay useful.

transit.title: Bike + transit helper
transit.intro: A conservative helper for mixing cycling with public transport. Treat it as practical guidance and re-check the operator page before a ride.
transit.metroRule: Use the last carriage. Weekdays: before 07:00 and after 20:00. Weekends and public holidays: all day.
transit.surfaceRule: Use the last door only when there is enough room, the vehicle is not crowded and your bike stays clear of other passengers.
etiquetteItems: Keep the bike clean and hold it steady while boarding.
Do not block wheelchairs, strollers, exits or the main aisle.
If the vehicle is full, wait for the next one instead of forcing space.

meetups.meetupNote: The exact meeting pin appears after approval. Instagram or Telegram reveal should stay optional and mutual.

home.meetupSubtitle: Drop an exact pin, set the time and publish a ride plan that can be reviewed later.
home.meetupNamePlaceholder: Example: easy evening lap from South Park
home.meetupAreaPlaceholder: Example: fountain by the main entrance
home.meetupNotePlaceholder: Add what riders should expect, bring or know before joining...
home.meetupComposerSafetyNote: Meetups should use public locations and clear timing so riders can decide safely.

meetupMapPick.active: Meetup pin mode is active. Click the map for exact placement.
meetupMapPick.required: Choose an exact point on the map before publishing the meetup.

meetupResult.submitted: Meetup published to the shared map.
meetupResult.authRequired: Sign in before publishing a meetup to the shared map.
meetupResult.unavailable: Meetup publishing is unavailable right now.

installPrompt.title: Install Bike Sofia
installPrompt.body: Keep the map one tap away and reuse your local reports and cached bike layer faster.

legal.title: Before you use Bike Sofia
legal.subtitle: This MVP mixes routing hints, community reports and optional meetup coordination. Use it carefully in the real world.
legal.adult: I am 18+ and use the social/meetup features at my own responsibility.
legal.meetup: I understand Bike Sofia is not responsible for in-person meetings or people I choose to meet.
legal.navigation: I understand routes and reports are guidance only and I must judge road, traffic and safety conditions myself.
legal.note: For the hosted beta we should replace this with proper lawyer-reviewed Terms, Privacy and community rules.

misc.cityStories: Central Sofia, layered history and calmer pauses
misc.afterRide: Finish with drinks, snacks and bike parking nearby
misc.lateNightRecovery: Late-night loop with a shkembe chorba ending
misc.summerEscape: Cooler, greener profile for hot days
